documentation.description: Id values used for ALIs table entries
Indicator of whether unit can be used as main program
Id values used for Sdep table entries
Id values used for Unit table entries

simple_types.name: Unit_Type
simple_types.code: type Unit_Type is (Is_Spec, Is_Body, Is_Spec_Only, Is_Body_Only);

documentation.description:
Indicates type of entry, if both body and spec appear in the ALI file,
then the first unit is marked Is_Body, and the second is marked Is_Spec.
If only a spec appears, then it is marked as Is_Spec_Only, and if only
a body appears, then it is marked Is_Body_Only).
Id values used for Withs table entries

array_types.name: Task_Pool_Type
array_types.code: type Task_Pool_Type is array (1 .. 3) of Int;

record_types.name: ALIs_Record

fields.name: Ofile
fields.description: Name of object file (because GNATLS does not return the ali file)

fields.name: Afile
fields.description: Name of ALI file (based on object file)

fields.name: Sfile
fields.description:
Name of source file that generates this ALI file (which is equal
to the name of the source file in the first unit table entry for
this ALI file, since the body if present is always first).

fields.name: Uname
fields.description: Name of Unit

fields.name: First_Unit
fields.description: Id of first Unit table entry for this file

fields.name: Last_Unit
fields.description: Id of last Unit table entry for this file

fields.name: First_Sdep
fields.description: Id of first Sdep table entry for this file

fields.name: Last_Sdep
fields.description: Id of last Sdep table entry for this file

fields.name: Main_Program
fields.description: Indicator of whether first unit can be used as main program.

fields.name: Tasking
fields.description:
Indicator of whether the unit (or the collocated units it
depends on) drags tasking. 'P' indicates that tasking is
required by the PCS (for concurrent remote calls), 'U' that
tasking is required in user code, '?' that the use of
tasking is still unknown and 'N' that the tasking is not
used. Note that 'P' is a stronger property than 'U' as this
has also an impact on the termination policy.

record_types.name: Channel_Partition_Type
Channel_Type
Conf_Unit_Type

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name of unit

fields.name: Node
fields.description: Frontend node

fields.name: My_ALI
fields.description: Corresponding ALI id

fields.name: My_Unit
fields.description: Corresponding unit id

fields.name: Partition
fields.description: Partition on which this unit is assigned

fields.name: Next_Unit
fields.description: Next unit assigned on the unit partition

fields.name: Most_Recent
fields.description: Most recent file for this unit

record_types.name: Host_Type
Location_Type
Partition_Type

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name of partition

fields.name: First_Unit
fields.description: Id of first unit table entry for this partition

fields.name: Last_Unit
fields.description: Id of last unit table entry for this partition

fields.name: Main_Subprogram
fields.description: Main subprogram for this partition

fields.name: First_Stub
fields.description: Id of first stub unit table entry for this partition

fields.name: Last_Stub
fields.description: Id of last stub unit table entry for this partition

fields.name: First_Channel
fields.description: Id of first channel table entry for this partition

fields.name: Last_Channel
fields.description: Id of last channel table entry for this partition

fields.name: Passive
fields.description: Indicate whether this partition is passive

fields.name: Tasking
fields.description:
Indicate why this partition requires tasking. '?' when the
use of tasking has not been established. 'N' when the
partition does not require tasking, 'U' when the partition
requires tasking because of user needs, 'P' when the
partition requires tasking because of PCS needs.

fields.name: Task_Pool
fields.description: Configuration of the task pool

fields.name: Priority
fields.description:
Priority to which remote calls are executed when priority
policy is server declared.

fields.name: Light_PCS
fields.description: True when the partition may be configured with a light PCS

fields.name: Termination
fields.description: Termination policy to activate on this partition

fields.name: Reconnection
fields.description:
Reconnection policy to execute on this partition when
another partition crashes.

fields.name: Host
fields.description: Host on which this partition has to be launched

fields.name: Command_Line
fields.description: Command line to pass when we launch the partition

fields.name: First_Network_Loc
fields.description: Id of first network location table entry for this partition

fields.name: Last_Network_Loc
fields.description: Id of last network location table entry for this partition

fields.name: Storage_Loc
fields.description: Id of storage location table entry for this partition

fields.name: Filter
fields.description: Name of filter to apply during filter registration

fields.name: Partition_Dir
fields.description: Internal directory in which we build the partition

fields.name: Executable_Dir
fields.description: Directory to store the executable file

fields.name: Executable_File
fields.description: Fully qualified executable file name

fields.name: To_Build
fields.description: True when we want to build this partition

fields.name: Node
fields.description: Frontend node

fields.name: Most_Recent
fields.description: Most recent source file of this partition

record_types.name: Sdep_Record

fields.name: Sfile
fields.description: Name of source file

record_types.name: Unit_Record

fields.name: My_ALI
fields.description: Corresponding ALI entry

fields.name: Uname
fields.description: Name of Unit

fields.name: Sfile
fields.description: Name of source file

fields.name: First_With
fields.description: Id of first withs table entry for this file

fields.name: Last_With
fields.description: Id of last withs table entry for this file

fields.name: Has_RACW
fields.description:
Indicates presence of RA parameter for a package that declares
at least one Remote Access to Class_Wide (RACW) object.

fields.name: Remote_Types
fields.description: Indicates a Remote_Types package.

fields.name: Shared_Passive
fields.description: Indicates a Shared_Passive package.

fields.name: RCI
fields.description: Indicates a Remote_Call_Interface package.

fields.name: Preelaborated
fields.description: Indicates a preelaborated package.

fields.name: Pure
fields.description: Indicates a pure package.

fields.name: Predefined
fields.description: Indicates if unit is language predefined (or a child of such a unit)

fields.name: Internal
fields.description: Indicates if unit is an internal unit (or a child of such a unit)

fields.name: Utype
fields.description: Type of entry

fields.name: Is_Generic
fields.description:
True for generic unit (i.e. a generic declaration, or a generic
body). False for a non-generic unit.

fields.name: Unit_Kind
fields.description:
Indicates the nature of the unit. 'p' for Packages and 's' for
subprograms.

record_types.name: With_Record

fields.name: Uname
fields.description: Name of Unit

fields.name: Sfile
fields.description: Name of source file, set to No_File in generic case

fields.name: Afile
fields.description: Name of ALI file, set to No_File in generic case

constants.name: Default_ALI
constants.code:
Default_ALI : constant ALIs_Record := (
   Ofile        => No_File_Name,
   Afile        => No_File_Name,
   Sfile        => No_File_Name,
   Uname        => No_Unit_Name,
   First_Unit   => No_Unit_Id,
   Last_Unit    => No_Unit_Id,
   First_Sdep   => First_Sdep_Id,
   Last_Sdep    => No_Sdep_Id,
   Main_Program => None,
   Tasking      => '?');

constants.name: Default_Unit
constants.code:
Default_Unit : constant Unit_Record := (
   My_ALI         => No_ALI_Id,
   Uname          => No_Unit_Name,
   Sfile          => No_File_Name,
   First_With     => First_With_Id,
   Last_With      => No_With_Id,
   Has_RACW       => False,
   Remote_Types   => False,
   Shared_Passive => False,
   RCI            => False,
   Preelaborated  => False,
   Pure           => False,
   Predefined     => False,
   Internal       => False,
   Utype          => Is_Spec_Only,
   Is_Generic     => False,
   Unit_Kind      => 'p');

constants.name: Default_With
constants.code:
Default_With : constant With_Record := (
   Uname          => No_Unit_Name,
   Afile          => No_File_Name,
   Sfile          => No_File_Name);

constants.name: Null_Conf_Unit
constants.code:
Null_Conf_Unit : constant Conf_Unit_Type :=
  (Name        => No_Unit_Name,
   Node        => Null_Node,
   My_ALI      => No_ALI_Id,
   My_Unit     => No_Unit_Id,
   Partition   => No_Partition_Id,
   Next_Unit   => No_Conf_Unit_Id,
   Most_Recent => No_File_Name);

constants.name: Null_Partition
constants.code:
Null_Partition : constant Partition_Type :=
  (Name               => No_Partition_Name,
   First_Unit         => No_Conf_Unit_Id,
   Last_Unit          => No_Conf_Unit_Id,
   Main_Subprogram    => No_Unit_Name,
   First_Stub         => First_Stub_Id,
   Last_Stub          => No_Stub_Id,
   First_Channel      => No_Channel_Id,
   Last_Channel       => No_Channel_Id,
   Passive            => BMaybe,
   Tasking            => '?',
   Task_Pool          => No_Task_Pool,
   Priority           => No_Priority,
   Light_PCS          => BMaybe,
   Termination        => No_Termination,
   Reconnection       => No_Reconnection,
   Command_Line       => No_Command_Line,
   Host               => No_Host_Id,
   First_Network_Loc  => No_Location_Id,
   Last_Network_Loc   => No_Location_Id,
   Storage_Loc        => No_Location_Id,
   Filter             => No_Filter_Name,
   Partition_Dir      => No_Directory_Name,
   Executable_Dir     => No_Directory_Name,
   Executable_File    => No_File_Name,
   To_Build           => True,
   Node               => Null_Node,
   Most_Recent        => No_File_Name);

generic_instantiations.name: ALIs
Channels
generic_instantiations.code:
package Channels  is new GNAT.Table
  (Table_Component_Type => Channel_Type,
   Table_Index_Type     => Channel_Id,
   Table_Low_Bound      => First_Channel_Id,
   Table_Initial        => 20,
   Table_Increment      => 10);

generic_instantiations.name: Conf_Units
generic_instantiations.code:
package Conf_Units is new GNAT.Table
  (Table_Component_Type => Conf_Unit_Type,
   Table_Index_Type     => Conf_Unit_Id,
   Table_Low_Bound      => First_Conf_Unit_Id,
   Table_Initial        => 200,
   Table_Increment      => 100);

generic_instantiations.name: Hosts
generic_instantiations.code:
package Hosts is new GNAT.Table
  (Table_Component_Type => Host_Type,
   Table_Index_Type     => Host_Id,
   Table_Low_Bound      => First_Host_Id,
   Table_Initial        => 20,
   Table_Increment      => 10);

generic_instantiations.name: Locations
generic_instantiations.code:
package Locations is new GNAT.Table
  (Table_Component_Type => Location_Type,
   Table_Index_Type     => Location_Id,
   Table_Low_Bound      => First_Location_Id,
   Table_Initial        => 20,
   Table_Increment      => 10);

generic_instantiations.name: Partitions
generic_instantiations.code:
package Partitions  is new GNAT.Table
  (Table_Component_Type => Partition_Type,
   Table_Index_Type     => Partition_Id,
   Table_Low_Bound      => First_Partition_Id,
   Table_Initial        => 20,
   Table_Increment      => 10);

generic_instantiations.name: Sdep
Stubs

package Stubs is new GNAT.Table

   Table_Initial        => 20,
   Table_Increment      => 10);
